    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    D

    dailyCashReceive - Variable in class logic.GameInstance
    Cash amount received within current day.
    dailyCashSpent - Variable in class logic.GameInstance
    Cash amount spent within current day.
    dailyOrderServed - Variable in class logic.GameInstance
    Amount of order served within current day.
    dailyReceivedLabelList - Variable in class gui.SummaryMenu
    Label list for daily cash received.
    dailyServedLabelList - Variable in class gui.SummaryMenu
    Label list for the number of daily orders served.
    dailySpentLabelList - Variable in class gui.SummaryMenu
    Label list for daily cash spent.
    dayCount - Variable in class logic.GameInstance
    Number of days passed in the game.
    dayLabel - Static variable in class gui.GameScene
    The label displaying the current day number.
    decreaseMaximumDay() - Static method in class application.Main
    Decrease maximum day value by 1
    DeepFryer - Class in logic.counters
    Counter for deep frying ingredients.
    DeepFryer(double, double, double, double) - Constructor for class logic.counters.DeepFryer
    Constructs a DeepFryer.
    defaultBackgroundImageURL - Variable in class gui.room.Room
    The background image URL for the room.
    delay - Variable in class sprites.AnimatedSprite
    The delay before the animation starts.
    description - Variable in class logic.menus.FrenchFries
    The description of the french fries order.
    description - Variable in class logic.menus.IceCreamCone
    The description of the ice cream cone.
    description - Variable in class logic.menus.IceCreamSandwich
    The description of the ice cream sandwich.
    description - Variable in class logic.menus.IceCreamSet
    The description of the ice cream set.
    description - Variable in class logic.menus.Sandwich
    The description of the sandwich order.
    DetailedMenu - Interface in logic.menus
    Interface for detailed menus.
    DialogManager - Class in util
    Manages dialogs in the game.
    DialogManager() - Constructor for class util.DialogManager
    Default constructor for DialogManager.
    dialogs - Variable in class gui.TutorialScene
    The list of dialog strings to be displayed.
    dialogSound - Static variable in class util.SFXManager
    The SoundEffect object of the dialog sound
    displayLabels - Variable in class gui.room.BackdoorRoom
    The labels displaying stock for each item type.
    displayText - Variable in enum class entity.IceCreamFlavor
    The display text for the flavor.
    Dough - Class in entity.ingredients
    Represents a dough ingredient.
    Dough() - Constructor for class entity.ingredients.Dough
    Constructs a new Dough ingredient.
    DOUGH - Enum constant in enum class logic.ItemSpriteType
    Enum constant for item sprite type.
    dropperDisplayText - Variable in enum class logic.ItemSpriteType
    The text to display in the dropper.
    duration - Variable in class sprites.AnimatedSprite
    The duration of the entire animation in seconds.
